# React Native Video

> A powerful, cross-platform video player library for React Native. Supports DRM (Widevine & FairPlay), plugin architecture, offline playback, and works on iOS, Android, tvOS, and visionOS. Built on Nitro Modules for type-safe, high-performance native communication.

## Getting Started

- [Introduction](https://docs.thewidlarzgroup.com/react-native-video/docs/v7/fundamentals/intro): What is React Native Video v7 — new Player API, architecture overview
- [Installation](https://docs.thewidlarzgroup.com/react-native-video/docs/v7/fundamentals/installation): System requirements, package setup, platform configuration
- [Configuration with Expo](https://docs.thewidlarzgroup.com/react-native-video/docs/v7/fundamentals/configuration/with-expo): Expo plugin setup
- [Manual Configuration](https://docs.thewidlarzgroup.com/react-native-video/docs/v7/fundamentals/configuration/without-expo): Bare React Native setup for iOS and Android

## Core API — Player

- [Player Overview](https://docs.thewidlarzgroup.com/react-native-video/docs/v7/player/player): VideoPlayer class — initialization, usage patterns, useVideoPlayer vs class
- [useVideoPlayer Hook](https://docs.thewidlarzgroup.com/react-native-video/docs/v7/player/use-video-player): React hook for video playback with automatic lifecycle management
- [VideoPlayer Class](https://docs.thewidlarzgroup.com/react-native-video/docs/v7/player/video-player): Full API reference — methods, properties, buffering, lifecycle
- [Player Events](https://docs.thewidlarzgroup.com/react-native-video/docs/v7/player/events): Event handling with useEvent hook — onLoad, onProgress, onError, onEnd
- [DRM Protection](https://docs.thewidlarzgroup.com/react-native-video/docs/v7/player/drm): Widevine (Android) and FairPlay (iOS/visionOS) setup with the DRM plugin

## Core API — VideoView

- [VideoView Component](https://docs.thewidlarzgroup.com/react-native-video/docs/v7/video-view/video-view): Rendering video, basic usage, component overview
- [VideoView Props](https://docs.thewidlarzgroup.com/react-native-video/docs/v7/video-view/props): All component properties — controls, PiP, resizeMode, surfaceType
- [VideoView Events](https://docs.thewidlarzgroup.com/react-native-video/docs/v7/video-view/events): Fullscreen and picture-in-picture event callbacks
- [VideoView Methods](https://docs.thewidlarzgroup.com/react-native-video/docs/v7/video-view/methods): Imperative methods — enterFullscreen, enterPictureInPicture
- [Video Chapters](https://docs.thewidlarzgroup.com/react-native-video/docs/v7/video-view/chapters): Chapter markers on seekbar (Pro plugin)

## Plugins

- [Plugin System Overview](https://docs.thewidlarzgroup.com/react-native-video/docs/v7/plugins/plugins): Modular plugin architecture — how plugins work
- [Plugin Registry](https://docs.thewidlarzgroup.com/react-native-video/docs/v7/plugins/registry): Available plugins and how to use them
- [Plugin Interface](https://docs.thewidlarzgroup.com/react-native-video/docs/v7/plugins/interface): API reference for building custom plugins
- [Plugin Examples](https://docs.thewidlarzgroup.com/react-native-video/docs/v7/plugins/examples): Implementation examples for common scenarios

## Analytics

- [Simple Analytics](https://docs.thewidlarzgroup.com/react-native-video/docs/v7/player/analytics/simple): JavaScript event-based video tracking
- [Manual Analytics](https://docs.thewidlarzgroup.com/react-native-video/docs/v7/player/analytics/manual): Native plugin integration for analytics

## Offline Video SDK (Commercial)

- [Getting Started](https://docs.thewidlarzgroup.com/react-native-video/docs/v7/player/downloading/getting-started): Installation and setup for offline playback
- [Downloading API](https://docs.thewidlarzgroup.com/react-native-video/docs/v7/player/downloading/downloading): Complete download management API
- [Download Events](https://docs.thewidlarzgroup.com/react-native-video/docs/v7/player/downloading/events-downloading): Progress tracking and status events
- [Track Selection](https://docs.thewidlarzgroup.com/react-native-video/docs/v7/player/downloading/track-selection): Select specific audio/video/subtitle tracks
- [DRM Offline](https://docs.thewidlarzgroup.com/react-native-video/docs/v7/player/downloading/drm-downloading): Downloading DRM-protected content with persistent licenses

## Full Documentation

- [llms-v7-full.txt](https://docs.thewidlarzgroup.com/react-native-video/llms-v7-full.txt): Complete v7 documentation in a single file
- [llms-v6-full.txt](https://docs.thewidlarzgroup.com/react-native-video/llms-v6-full.txt): Complete v6 documentation in a single file
